forbidden.title: You don't have access to this page
forbidden.description: The Admin Panel is restricted to Bosla staff. If you believe this is a mistake, contact an administrator.

emptyState.defaultDescription: This section is part of the Admin Panel foundation — its editor hasn't been built yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: An overview of Bosla's content and operations.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: This is the foundation of the Admin Panel — section editors, uploads, and forms are coming in later steps.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of Bosla's content and operations.

homepage.label: Homepage CMS
homepage.description: Edit the homepage's sections, order, and visibility.

content.label: Legal Content
content.description: Edit the Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Refund Policy.

navigation.label: Navigation
navigation.description: Manage header and footer navigation links.

footer.label: Footer
footer.description: Edit the footer's tagline, social links, and newsletter copy.

media.label: Media Library
media.description: Browse and manage uploaded images and assets.

seo.label: SEO
seo.description: Manage sitewide and per-page search metadata.

instructors.label: Instructors
instructors.description: Manage instructor profiles, Public Portraits, and Featured Instructors.

instructorApplications.label: Instructor Applications
instructorApplications.description: Review and approve applications to become an instructor.

courses.label: Courses
courses.description: Moderate and curate the course catalog.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Manage the course category cards shown on the homepage.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Curate the student reviews featured on the homepage.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.description: Manage the homepage's frequently asked questions.

contact.label: Contact Messages
contact.description: Messages submitted through the public Contact form.

jobs.label: Background Jobs
jobs.description: Monitor the media/video processing queue — for operational debugging.

audit.label: Audit Log
audit.description: Review a history of admin actions.

enrollments.label: Enrollments
enrollments.description: Manually grant and manage student access to courses.

orders.label: Orders
orders.description: View and manage every course purchase.

payments.label: Payments
payments.description: Every payment attempt, refund, and webhook event across providers.

revenue.label: Revenue
revenue.description: Platform and instructor revenue, allocations, and reports.

payouts.label: Payouts
payouts.description: Instructor payout batches and their lifecycle.

commissionRules.label: Commission Rules
commissionRules.description: How each sale is split between the platform and instructors.

homepageEditor.pageDescription: Edit the homepage's sections, order, visibility, and SEO.
homepageEditor.sectionsOverviewDescription: Reorder, enable, or disable each section. Expand a section to edit its content.
homepageEditor.conflictError: This was changed by someone else while you were editing. Reload the page to see the latest version before saving again.
homepageEditor.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
homepageEditor.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Sitewide search-result title, description, and social preview image for the homepage.
seo.ogImageHint: Shown when this page is shared on social media.

hero.title: Hero
hero.description: The homepage's opening section — headline, description, CTA buttons, badges, statistics, and instructor slides.
hero.imageHint: Leave blank to keep the decorative illustration.

featuredCourses.title: Featured Courses
featuredCourses.description: The courses section's heading copy. Which courses appear is not yet CMS-driven — see the field hint below.
featuredCourses.subtitle: Subtitle
featuredCourses.courseIdsHint: Not yet shown on the live homepage — the public Featured Courses section still shows every course until a real Courses table exists.

whyBosla.title: Why Bosla
whyBosla.description: The platform's differentiator pillars — heading and a reorderable list of cards.
whyBosla.subtitle: Subtitle

learningExperience.title: Learning Experience
learningExperience.description: Heading and capability bullets. The lesson-player mockup is decorative and not editable.
learningExperience.subtitle: Subtitle

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Section heading only — the testimonials shown are sourced from student reviews, not authored here.
testimonials.subtitle: Subtitle

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Heading and the question/answer list shown on the homepage.
faq.question: Question

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We couldn't load this page. Please try again.

courses.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or create a new course.

confirm.delete: Permanently delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.

toasts.rejected: Course rejected and sent back to draft.
toasts.conflict: This course was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

editorPlaceholder.title: Course editor coming soon
editorPlaceholder.description: The full course editor arrives in a later step. For now, use the course list to archive, restore, or manage existing courses.

courseEditor.createDescription: Add a new course to the catalog.
courseEditor.seoAttachError: Could not set up SEO for this course.
courseEditor.seoNotSetUp: This course doesn't have an SEO record yet.
courseEditor.seoAfterCreate: Save this course to unlock its SEO settings.

fields.title: Title
fields.subtitle: Subtitle
fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
fields.statusHint: Use Submit for Review, Approve, Reject, Archive, or Restore from the course list to change this.
fields.saleEndsAtHint: Leave blank for a promotion without a deadline.
fields.estimatedDurationHint: Leave blank if not yet known.
fields.featuredHint: Eligible for the homepage's Featured Courses section.
fields.mediaHint: Choose an existing file, or upload a new one, from the Media Library.

courseEditor.validationError: Some fields are missing or invalid — check the highlighted fields (title and description are required).

enrollments.createDescription: Manually enroll a student in a course.
enrollments.sourceHint: This enrollment will be recorded as a manual grant — no payment is involved.
enrollments.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or grant a new enrollment.

toasts.conflict: This enrollment was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

users.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.

toasts.roleSyncFailed: The role change couldn't be fully synced and was rolled back. Please try again.

enrollments.emptyDescription: This user isn't enrolled in any course yet. Grant one above.

learning.emptyDescription: This user hasn't enrolled in any course yet.

quizAttempts.emptyDescription: This user hasn't attempted any quiz yet.

orders.emptyDescription: Orders will appear here once Commerce is available.

activity.emptyDescription: Actions this user performs as an admin will appear here.

orders.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.

attempts.title: Payment attempts
attempts.description: Every attempt to pay for this order — a retry opens a new attempt rather than reusing one.

timeline.title: Timeline
timeline.description: Every event recorded against this order, in order.

toasts.conflict: This order was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

coupons.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or create a new coupon.
coupons.createDescription: Set up a new discount code.

fields.codeHint: Letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores only — always stored uppercase.
fields.maxRedemptionsPerUserHint: Max uses per student. Blank = unlimited.
fields.minSubtotalHint: Applies only at or above this subtotal. Blank = none.
fields.maxDiscountAmountHint: Cap on the computed discount. Blank = uncapped.

toasts.conflict: This coupon was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

media.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, alt text, tag…

upload.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
upload.dropzoneHint: Images, video, audio, PDF, Office documents, and ZIP — uploads go directly to secure storage

states.duplicate: Already in the library — reused the existing file

media.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or upload a new file.

toasts.notFound: This asset could no longer be found.

detail.title: Media Details
detail.confirmDelete: Delete this file permanently? This cannot be undone.
detail.confirmDeleteUsed: This file is still used in {count, plural, one {# place} other {# places}} — deleting it will remove those references. Delete anyway?
detail.replaceHint: New file keeps the same links everywhere.

usage.title: Where this is used
usage.empty: Not used anywhere — safe to delete.

picker.emptyDescription: Try a different search, or upload a new file.

instructorApplications.searchPlaceholder: Search by applicant name or email…

toasts.conflict: This application was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

featuredPanel.title: Featured Instructors
featuredPanel.description: Choose up to 4 instructors to show in the homepage Hero, in this order. Drag to reorder.
featuredPanel.maxReached: You can feature up to 4 instructors.

fields.slugHint: Used in internal references; lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
fields.name: Full name
fields.title: Title
fields.avatarImageIdHint: Shown inside the authenticated experience (e.g. the instructor's own dashboard). The instructor can also set this themselves.
fields.publicPortraitImageIdHint: The public marketing image — homepage Hero, course cards, and other public pages. Separate from the personal avatar; only an Admin can set this.
fields.isActiveHint: Inactive instructors are hidden from all public pages, even if featured.
fields.featuredStatusHint: Managed from the Featured Instructors panel on the Instructors list, not here.

articles.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters, or write a new article.

confirm.delete: Permanently delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.

toasts.conflict: This article was changed by someone else. The list has been refreshed.

settings.showMostPopularHint: The three-card rail at the top of the public blog page.
settings.mostPopularShown: "Most popular" is now visible on the blog.
settings.mostPopularHidden: "Most popular" is now hidden from the blog.

articleEditor.createDescription: Write a new blog article. It starts as a draft — publish it from the articles list.
articleEditor.editDescription: Update the article's content, category, cover image, and SEO.
articleEditor.seoAttachError: Could not set up SEO for this article.
articleEditor.seoNotSetUp: SEO isn't set up for this article yet.
articleEditor.seoAfterCreate: You can edit SEO after creating the article.

fields.title: Title
fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only — used in the article's URL.
fields.statusHint: Publish or unpublish from the articles list.
fields.featuredHint: Pinned to the top of the blog's "Most popular" section.
fields.coverImageHint: Shown at the top of the article and on blog cards.
fields.excerptPlaceholder: One or two sentences that make someone want to read on…

richText.imagePlaceholder: Choose an image from the library
richText.citationEmpty: Add sources in the References section first — then insert [n] markers here.

articleEditor.validationError: Some fields are missing or invalid — check the highlighted fields (title and body are required).

quiz.feedbackPlaceholder: Feedback shown after the reader picks this choice (optional)…

referencesEditor.empty: No references yet. Add one when the article makes a claim worth checking.

articleCategories.title: Blog Categories
articleCategories.description: The topics readers can browse the blog by.
articleCategories.emptyDescription: Create the first blog category to organize articles.

fields.name: Name
fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only — used in blog URLs.

confirm.delete: Delete the category "{name}"? Its articles keep existing without a category.
Delete the series "{name}"? Its articles will keep their content.

payments.searchPlaceholder: Search by payment, order, or provider reference…
payments.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.

refund.fullOnly: This provider only supports full refunds — leave the amount empty.

events.empty: No webhook events recorded for this payment.

revenue.emptyDescription: Completed sales will appear here as revenue allocations.

allocations.title: Revenue Allocations
allocations.description: The immutable ledger — one row per share of every sale, reversal, and adjustment.

balances.title: Instructor Balances
balances.description: Pending, available, and paid earnings per instructor — matured on read.
balances.emptyDescription: Balances appear once commission rules allocate instructor revenue.

payouts.emptyDescription: Create a batch to sweep available instructor balances into a payout.
payouts.itemsEmptyDescription: This batch contains no payable items.

create.title: Create payout batch
create.hint: Sweeps every positive available balance in the chosen currency into per-instructor items. Transfers are executed out-of-band, then marked paid here.

commissionRules.emptyDescription: Without a rule the platform keeps 100% of every sale. Create one to grant instructors a share.

create.title: Create commission rule
create.hint: Creating a rule closes the open rule on the same target — past sales keep the rule that priced them.

close.success: Rule closed — future sales fall through to the next rule.

content.historyDescription: Review, compare, and restore previously published versions as drafts.
content.noVersions: No published versions have been recorded yet.
content.compareDescription: Choose two published versions to compare the readable text in either language.
content.confirmRestore: Restore version {version} as the current draft? This will replace the editor contents.
content.acceptorsDescription: Every user whose acceptance record points to this exact published version.
content.noAcceptors: No one has accepted this version yet.

toasts.published: Published — the public page now shows this version.

contact.confirmDelete: Delete this message? This cannot be undone.
